changeSet.author: openelis-admin-access

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'AllLabUnits'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_roles lr JOIN clinlims.system_role sr ON lr.role::int = sr.id WHERE lr.lab_unit_role_map_id = (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'AllLabUnits') AND sr.name IN ('TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator')

changeSet.comment: Add Traditional Medicine roles to AllLabUnits so admin users get automatic access (per TMMRD SRS Section 11)

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Lab Technician')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Researcher')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Lab Manager')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Principal Investigator')
